WahalaReport.title: Wahala Report
WahalaReport.description: A report of a health system failure submitted by a user.

userEmail.description: The email of the user who submitted the report.

userComplaint.description: The description of the health system failure.

aiGeneratedScript.description: The AI-generated comic script for the report.

aiShortResponse.description: The AI-generated short response for the report.

timestamp.description: The time the report was submitted.

userId.description: The UID of the user who submitted the report.

/artifacts/{appId}/public/data/wahala_re.description: Collection of health system failure reports.
